mapper.select: select * from tc where cid=#{cid} and tid=#{tid}
select COALESCE(max(tsort), 0) as countCourse from tc where tid=#{tid}
mapper.update: update tc set tarchive=#{archive} where tcid=#{tcid}
mapper.select: select tc.tcid as tcid, tc.tid as tid, course.cname as cname, course.cid as cid from tc left join course on course.cid=tc.cid where tc.tid=#{tid} and (tc.tarchive=1 or tc.cid in (select cid from course where archive=1))
mapper.update: update tc set tsort=#{tsort} where tcid=#{tcid}
